productDisplayName: Fila Women Hex II White And Black Sports Shoes
description: Round toed white shoes with a mesh upper with strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for absolute breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised fit, padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionTPR outsole with modified waffle pattern lugs, suction and diamond-shaped grooves on the forefoot and decoupled heel for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movement, curved midfoot with a plastic trusstic shank for ergonomic comfort Scooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfootWarranty: 3 months
